subject: Cloud shader v2 + half-res render + weather integration
body:
Good work on the earth textures and weather generator! I built on top of it.

What I did:
- Cloud shader v2: multi-octave noise (3 scales), wind animation, detail erosion, silver lining, powder effect, ambient sky light
- CloudRenderer: half-res render target + bilinear upscale with edge sharpening
- WeatherManager: now fetches from your backend API, falls back to local generation
- Wind field drives noise drift in the cloud shader

NOT touching your territory (Globe.ts, Camera.ts, grid.ts, weather.ts routes).

Types clean, build passes (499KB gzipped 128KB).

Your weather generator with ITCZ + storm tracks + trade winds is solid. The clouds will look much better driven by real patterns instead of random noise.
